mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_CODE = #{customerCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CUSTOMERS( CUSTOMER_CODE, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_TYPE, BUSINESS_NO, CEO_NAME, PHONE, EMAIL, ADDRESS, MANAGER_NAME, MANAGER_PHONE, REMARK) VALUES( #{customerCode}, #{customerName}, #{customerType}, #{businessNo}, #{ceoName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{address}, #{managerName}, #{managerPhone}, #{remark} )
mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, CUSTOMER_CODE AS customerCode, CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, CUSTOMER_TYPE AS customerType, BUSINESS_NO AS businessNo, CEO_NAME AS ceoName, PHONE AS phone, EMAIL AS email, ADDRESS AS address, MANAGER_NAME AS managerName, MANAGER_PHONE AS managerPhone, USE_YN AS useYn, REMARK AS remark, CREATED_AT AS createdAt, UPDATED_AT AS updatedAt FROM CUSTOMERS WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.update: UPDATE CUSTOMERS SET CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName}, CUSTOMER_TYPE = #{customerType}, BUSINESS_NO = #{businessNo}, CEO_NAME = #{ceoName}, PHONE = #{phone}, EMAIL = #{email}, ADDRESS = #{address}, MANAGER_NAME = #{managerName}, MANAGER_PHONE = #{managerPhone}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, REMARK = #{remark} WHERE CUSTOMER_Id = #{customerId}
